zh.Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Ha: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guislain II d'Olhain於1086年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷布維-朗赤其特時，他的父親Guislain d'Ollehain34歲，母親Giseberthe de Blingel25歲。他和Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1141年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guislain II d'Olhain于1086年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷布維-朗赤其特时，他的父亲Guislain d'Ollehain34岁，母亲Giseberthe de Blingel25岁。他和Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1141年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guislain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of recent origin, or at any rate a recent introduction to the English-speaking world. It is evidently a revival of the Old French oblique case of   Giselle  , in a spelling that suggests Low German, Dutch, or Flemish influence.

variants.name: Ghislaine
meanings: Old French: oblique case of   Giselle  , in a spelling that suggests Dutch or Flemish influence.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guislain II d'Olhain was born in 1086, in Rebreuve-Ranchicourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Guislain d'Ollehain, was 34 and his mother, Giseberthe de Blingel, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely. He died in 1141, in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guislain II d'Olhain est né en 1086, à Rebreuve-Ranchicourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Guislain d'Ollehain, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Giseberthe de Blingel, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely. Il est décédé en 1141, à Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guislain II d'Olhain 1086 in Rebreuve-Ranchicourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guislain d'Ollehain 34 und seine Mutter Giseberthe de Blingel 25. Er hatte mit Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1141 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guislain II d'Olhain è nato il nel 1086 nel Rebreuve-Ranchicourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Guislain d'Ollehain, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Giseberthe de Blingel, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely. Morì nel 1141, nel Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guislain II d'Olhainが1086年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスレブレウベ-ランチコウルトで生まれた時，父Guislain d'Ollehainは34歳，母Giseberthe de Blingelは25歳であった。彼はGilberthe - Giselberthe de Relyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1141年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレスニコウルト-レ-ドルメンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guislain II d'Olhain(이)가 1086년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 레브레우브-랭치쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guislain d'Ollehain(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Giseberthe de Blingel(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1141년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레스니쿠르트-레-도멘에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guislain II d'Olhain nasceu em 1086, em Rebreuve-Ranchicourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Guislain d'Ollehain, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Giseberthe de Blingel, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely. Ele faleceu em 1141, em Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guislain II d'Olhain родился в 1086 г. в местности ребреуве-ранчикоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Guislain d'Ollehain было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Giseberthe de Blingel, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely. Он умер в 1141 г. в местности фресникоурт-ле-долмен, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guislain II d'Olhain nació en 1086, en Rebreuve-Ranchicourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Guislain d'Ollehain, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Giseberthe de Blingel, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Gilberthe - Giselberthe de Rely. Murió en 1141, en Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
